ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IsNew() && IsPickVal (Status,"Completed") && Subject!="Call – Attempt" && Subject!="Call – Conversation"&& Subject!="Call – Qualification"&& Subject!="Call – Left Message" && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage:
Please select one of these values:
Call – Attempt Call – Conversation Call – Qualification Call – Left Message
